title: Prime Cuts
description: A ranching mod that adds new drops and a variety of new food items
body:
**
Prime Cuts expands ranching in Minecraft by adding new drops for animals such as cows, pigs, sheep, and others. With these resources, you can prepare a wide variety of recipes that not only diversify the available food options but also allow you to decorate your world with them.
**

**➤ Added a new additional drop was for each animal**
➜ Cow: raw beef leg
➜ Pig: raw pork shank
➜ Sheep: raw mutton ribs
➜ Horse: raw horse meat
➜ Squid: raw tentacle
➜ Turtle: raw turtle meat
➜ Llama: raw llama meat
➜ Donkey: raw donkey meat
**➤ Added new food recipes (burgers, pizzas, hot dogs, stews, meat pies, soups and much more)**
➜ Simple Recipes
➜ Exclusive recipes for the smoker
**➤ Added new decorative food (burgers, pizzas, meat pies, ham and much more)**
**➤ Added a new ore (salt stone)**
**➤ Compatible with other mods that add food (salt, milk, flour, dough and cheese)**
**➤ Traducido al español (ES-ES)**

Spoiler **➤ Basic ingredient recipes** ➜ Flour
_↪ Ingredients: wheat_
![Flour](https://i.postimg.cc/CKh0V69G/2-1-1-Flour.png) ➜ Dough
_↪ Ingredients: water bucket + flour_
![Dough](https://i.postimg.cc/cJxWN5PT/2-1-2-Dough.png) ➜ Burger bun
_↪ Ingredients: salt + egg + dough_
![BurgerBun](https://i.postimg.cc/bvR5sMr4/2-1-3-Burger-Bun.png) ➜ Hot dog bun
_↪ Ingredients: salt + egg + dough_
![HotDogBun](https://i.postimg.cc/5t4JMkDg/2-1-4-Hot-Dog-Bun.png) ➜ Cheese
_↪ Ingredients: milk bucket + salt_
![Cheese](https://i.postimg.cc/5t4JMkD3/2-1-5-Cheese.png) ➜ Salted meats
_↪ Ingredients: salt + raw meat (beef, porkchop, mutton, horse meat, tentacle, turtle meat, chicken, rabbit, llama meat and donkey meat)_
![Salted](https://i.postimg.cc/Jng9vggC/2-1-6-Salted.gif) **➤ Simple recipes** ➜ Cooked pork shank
_↪ Ingredients: raw pork shank_
![CookedPorkShank](https://i.postimg.cc/9FqrBLc1/2-2-1-Cooked-Pork-Shank.png) ➜ Cooked mutton ribs
_↪ Ingredients: raw mutton ribs_
![CookedMuttonRibs](https://i.postimg.cc/gk6nKgGM/2-2-2-Cooked-Mutton-Ribs.png) ➜ Cooked horse meat
_↪ Ingredients: raw horse meat_
![CookedHorseMeat](https://i.postimg.cc/pXnpBsP6/2-2-3-Cooked-Horse-Meat.png) ➜ Cooked tentacle
_↪ Ingredients: raw tentacle_
![CookedTentacle](https://i.postimg.cc/m2FtSmT6/2-2-4-Cooked-Tentacle.png) ➜ Cooked turtle meat
_↪ Ingredients: raw turtle meat_
![CookedTurtleMeat](https://i.postimg.cc/Nfr5xdQp/2-2-5-Cooked-Turtle-Meat.png) ➜ Cooked llama meat
_↪ Ingredients: raw llama meat_
![CookedLlamaMeat](https://i.postimg.cc/c4KJKGZR/2-2-6-Cooked-Llama-Meat.png) ➜ Cooked donkey meat
_↪ Ingredients: raw donkey meat_
![CookedDonkeyMeat](https://i.postimg.cc/PrLqLnhQ/2-2-7-Cooked-Donkey-Meat.png) **➤ Smoker recipes** ➜ Beef pepperoni
_↪ Ingredients: salted beef_
![BeefPepperoni](https://i.postimg.cc/50R2BCGn/2-3-1-Beef-Pepperoni.png) ➜ Bacon
_↪ Ingredients: salted sorkchop_
![Bacon](https://i.postimg.cc/xC41vz74/2-3-2-Bacon.png) ➜ Lamb jerky
_↪ Ingredients: salted mutton_
![LambJerky](https://i.postimg.cc/50R2BCGT/2-3-3-Lamb-Jerky.png) ➜ Dried horse meat
_↪ Ingredients: salted horse meat_
![DriedHorseMeat](https://i.postimg.cc/k4pgQbZL/2-3-4-Dried-Horse-Meat.png) ➜ Surume
_↪ Ingredients: salted tentacle_
![Surume](https://i.postimg.cc/0QByYw34/2-3-5-Surume.png) ➜ Dried turtle meat
_↪ Ingredients: salted turtle meat_
![DriedTurtleMeat](https://i.postimg.cc/3RcxXvV7/2-3-6-Dried-Turtle-Meat.png) ➜ Chicken jerky
_↪ Ingredients: salted chicken_
![ChickenJerky](https://i.postimg.cc/j5FSH7mT/2-3-7-Chicken-Jerky.png) ➜ Rabbit jerky
_↪ Ingredients: salted rabbit_
![RabbitJerky](https://i.postimg.cc/MTFp7QNq/2-3-8-Rabbit-Jerky.png) ➜ Dried llama meat
_↪ Ingredients: salted llama meat_
![DriedLlamaMeat](https://i.postimg.cc/wMgbCpVP/2-3-9-Dried-Llama-Meat.png) ➜ Dried donkey meat
_↪ Ingredients: salted donkey meat_
![DriedDonkeyMeat](https://i.postimg.cc/6qt1kXcX/2-3-10-Dried-Donkey-Meat.png) **➤ Recipes** ➜ Cooked beef burger
_↪ Ingredients: egg + salted beef_
![CookedBeefBurger](https://i.postimg.cc/1RVqWmHH/2-4-1-1-Cooked-Beef-Burger.png) ![CookedBeefBurger](https://i.postimg.cc/1RVqWmHM/2-4-1-2-Cooked-Beef-Burger.png) ➜ Cooked Sausage
_↪ Ingredients: salted sorkchop_
![CookedSausage](https://i.postimg.cc/mZ1HdLw8/2-4-2-1-Cooked-Sausage.png) ![CookedSausage](https://i.postimg.cc/HW8ySY26/2-4-2-2-Cooked-Sausage.png) ➜ Calamari rings
_↪ Ingredients: flour + cooked tentacle + salt_
![CalamariRings](https://i.postimg.cc/kXHwCVz5/2-5-1-Calamari-Rings.png) ➜ Turtle skewers
_↪ Ingredients: salt + cooked turtle meat + flour + stick_
![TurtleSkewers](https://i.postimg.cc/Hk7zkY1m/2-5-2-Turtle-Skewers.png) ➜ Meatballs
_↪ Ingredients: egg + salted beef + bowl_
![Meatballs](https://i.postimg.cc/8PBs3jrR/2-6-1-Meatballs.png) ➜ Pulled pork
_↪ Ingredients: egg + salted sorkchop + bowl_
![PulledPork](https://i.postimg.cc/cLx6N0Qt/2-6-2-Pulled-Pork.png) ➜ Mutton stew
_↪ Ingredients: carrot + potato + salted mutton + bowl_
![MuttonStew](https://i.postimg.cc/RZSqz4cn/2-6-3-Mutton-Stew.png) ➜ Horse stew
_↪ Ingredients: carrot + potato + salted mutton + bowl_
![HorseStew](https://i.postimg.cc/mgLhGBQH/2-6-4-Horse-Stew.png) ➜ Squid ice cream
_↪ Ingredients: salted tentacle + snowball + milk bucket + bowl_
![SquidIceCream](https://i.postimg.cc/W1NtPTMZ/2-6-5-Squid-Ice-Cream.png) ➜ Turtle soup
_↪ Ingredients: salted turtle meat + carrot + water bucket + bowl_
![TurtleSoup](https://i.postimg.cc/524jMbww/2-6-6-Turtle-Soup.png) ➜ Chicken nuggets
_↪ Ingredients: egg + flour + salted chicken + bowl_
![ChickenNuggets](https://i.postimg.cc/JtCn350Y/2-6-7-Chicken-Nuggets.png) ➜ Rabbit soup
_↪ Ingredients: salted rabbit + carrot + water bucket + bowl_
![RabbitSoup](https://i.postimg.cc/RZSqz4cL/2-6-8-Rabbit-Soup.png) ➜ Llama stew
_↪ Ingredients: carrot + potato + salted llama meat + bowl_
![LlamaStew](https://i.postimg.cc/vHL68dzd/2-6-9-Llama-Stew.png) ➜ Donkey stew
_↪ Ingredients: carrot + potato + salted donkey meat + bowl_
![DonkeyStew](https://i.postimg.cc/m2NFZGwZ/2-6-10-Donkey-Stew.png) ➜ Hot dog
_↪ Ingredients: cooked Sausage + hot dog bun_
![HotDog](https://i.postimg.cc/JzY7VJ7Z/2-7-1-Hot-Dog.png) ➜ Special hot dog
_↪ Ingredients: silver sausage, golden sausage or platinum sausage + hot dog bun_
_↪ Note: this mod doesn't add silver or platinum, but it is compatible with other mods that do._
![SpecialHotDog](https://i.postimg.cc/7LCHx6bn/2-7-2-1-Special-Hot-Dog.gif) ![SpecialHotDog](https://i.postimg.cc/43KfJdn6/2-7-2-2-Special-Hot-Dog.gif) ➜ Burgers
_↪ Ingredients: cheese, beef pepperoni, bacon, lamb jerky, dried horse meat, surume, dried turtle meat, chicken jerky, rabbit jerky, dried llama meat or dried donkey meat + cooked beef burger + burger bun_
![Burgers](https://i.postimg.cc/W47yhKtv/2-7-3-Burgers.gif) **➤ Decorative recipes (they have a 3D model)** ➜ Pizzas
_↪ Ingredients: beef pepperoni, bacon, lamb jerky or dried horse meat + cheese + dough_
![Pizzas](https://i.postimg.cc/QtpdqnKM/2-7-4-Pizzas.gif) ➜ Beef wellington
_↪ Ingredients: carrot + egg + brown mushroom + raw beef leg + flour_
![BeefWellington](https://i.postimg.cc/MT4Y296f/2-8-1-1-Beef-Wellington.png) ![BeefWellington](https://i.postimg.cc/sX8JdTjS/2-8-1-2-Beef-Wellington.png) ➜ Ham
_↪ Ingredients: salt + honey bottle + raw pork shank_
![Ham](https://i.postimg.cc/JngQVprZ/2-8-2-1-Ham.png) ![Ham](https://i.postimg.cc/yd5T4L10/2-8-2-2-Ham.png) ➜ Shepherd's pie
_↪ Ingredients: baked potato + carrot + cooked mutton ribs_
![ShepherdsPie](https://i.postimg.cc/rF8qDgKc/2-8-3-Shepherds-Pie.png) ➜ Horse meat pie
_↪ Ingredients: egg + carrot + cooked horse meat_
![HorseMeatPie](https://i.postimg.cc/rF8qDgKq/2-8-4-Horse-Meat-Pie.png) ➜ Squid pie
_↪ Ingredients: egg + salt + raw tentacle_
![SquidPie](https://i.postimg.cc/Px82V1dv/2-8-5-Squid-Pie.png) ➜ Turtle sashimi
_↪ Ingredients: kelp + raw turtle meat_
![TurtleSashimi](https://i.postimg.cc/HspTr3VY/2-8-6-Turtle-Sashimi.png) ➜ Roasted glazed chicken
_↪ Ingredients: honey bottle + salt + raw chicken_
![RoastedGlazedChicken](https://i.postimg.cc/vB6325G5/2-8-7-1-Roasted-Glazed-Chicken.png) ![RoastedGlazedChicken](https://i.postimg.cc/Dy27S58w/2-8-7-2-Roasted-Glazed-Chicken.png) ➜ Chicken terrine
_↪ Ingredients: egg + salt + milk bucket + brown mushroom + cooked chicken_
![ChickenTerrine](https://i.postimg.cc/xCbtpL9K/2-8-8-Chicken-Terrine.png) ➜ Rabbit pie
_↪ Ingredients: egg + red mushroom + cooked rabbit_
![RabbitPie](https://i.postimg.cc/wT691F7v/2-8-9-Rabbit-Pie.png) ➜ Roasted glazed rabbit
_↪ Ingredients: honey bottle + salt + raw rabbit_
![RoastedGlazedRabbit](https://i.postimg.cc/QCGS2VMC/2-8-10-1-Roasted-Glazed-Rabbit.png) ![RoastedGlazedRabbit](https://i.postimg.cc/9FWcD1rr/2-8-10-2-Roasted-Glazed-Rabbit.png) ➜ Llama meat pie
_↪ Ingredients: egg + pumpkin + pumpkin seeds + cooked llama meat_
![LlamaMeatPie](https://i.postimg.cc/8zzb9K0p/2-8-11-Llama-Meat-Pie.png) ➜ Donkey meat pie
_↪ Ingredients: egg + brown mushroom + cooked donkey meat_
![DonkeyMeatPie](https://i.postimg.cc/rww93nPm/2-8-12-Donkey-Meat-Pie.png)

Spoiler Credits: [Turtle](https://www.youtube.com/@turtleundercover)

**➤ I will continue adding recipes with each update (updates will be minor but frequent).**
**➤ Updating so many versions of the mod is a major undertaking. As a result, I will be limiting the number of versions that receive new content moving forward.**
➜ Minecraft 1.16.5: The version I play on with my friends.
➜ Minecraft 1.20.1 & 1.21.1: Currently the most popular versions of the game.
➜ Minecraft 1.21.8 & 26.1.2: The latest version of the mod.
